name: Asparagus Thai-Style w/ Chilies, Garlic, & Basil
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Serrano or jalapeno chile, minced
1 1/2 pounds Asparagus; snapped and steamed slightly undercooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a wok or large, deep skillet over high heat. Add oil and swirl to coat the surface.
2. Add garlic and minced chile; toss until garlic turns golden, about 15 seconds.
3. Add the asparagus; stir-fry until coated with oil, about 15 seconds.
4. Add soy sauces and 1 tablespoon water; stir-fry until basil wilts.
Serve hot or at room temperature.
